title: 天皇賞（春）の後に・リザルト

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What a fierce contest between these fantastic
senior racers!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Not to be outdone by her sister, Biwa Hayahide
has shown us she's just as powerful!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nice work.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe, you too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm winning the next one, though. Later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's ridiculous for them to say that you're "just as
powerful" as Brian. Of course you are. Don't they
know who you are?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm back.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I think so too. I was able to run at my
very best today.

As I see Biwa Hayahide smiling proudly, a sense
of regret fills me.
choice_data_list:
(If only we'd known this race would be at
Hanshin from the beginning...)

text_block_list.text:
Then maybe she would've been able to put on an
even better performance. She might've...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This is incredible, folks! Narita Brian has not only
won the race, she's set a new record!
She might've even set a new record...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Earth to Trainer! What are you mulling about so
seriously?
choice_data_list:
I was thinking about how you were so close to
an even better result.

I was thinking about how you were so close to
an even better result.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's certainly important not to grow
complacent. And I agree—I'm not satisfied with
my performance today either.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As I am now, I definitely can't be called the best
of my generation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's why I want to test myself at the Takarazuka
Kinen next.

The Takarazuka Kinen... Only the best and most
famous Umamusume are invited to take part in it.
Not only that...
choice_data_list: The Takarazuka Kinen is held at Hanshin, right?
The Takarazuka Kinen is held at Hanshin, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Right. The length of the race is different, but yes,
it's also held here at the Hanshin Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Are you still upset about the venue change?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Goodness. There's no point fussing over it. It's not
as if anything could've been done about it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's just focus on the next race. First, we should
look up who I'm most likely to be up against in
the Takarazuka Kinen...

I do my best to leave my worries behind and
switch gears to start preparing for the Takarazuka
Kinen together with Biwa Hayahide.

This time, I'll make sure she can really run at her
full potential!
